title: neolehmannia williamsii
intro: Neolehmannia williamsii, also known as False Unicorn Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, specifically in the eastern regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Neolehmannia williamsii include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support women's health by regulating menstrual cycles and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Neolehmannia williamsii can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
